summary: Batch PO Split Demo feature testing complete. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Pipeline Demo page loads with both Single PO Pipeline Demo and Batch PO Split Demo sections. Run Batch Split button triggers async job with polling progress. Backend processes 5 pages through full AI pipeline in ~75 seconds.
seed_data_creation: Batch demo generates 5-page PDF from BATCH_PO_DATA (PO-61312 through PO-61316)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch PO Split Demo feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/sales-dashboard/demo/run-batch (returns job_id immediately), GET /api/sales-dashboard/demo/batch-status/{job_id} (poll for progress). Frontend: Pipeline Demo tab at /sales-inventory?tab=pipeline-demo with data-testid='run-batch-btn' for batch demo and data-testid='run-pipeline-btn' for single PO demo. Batch processing takes 60-90 seconds to complete 5 pages through full AI pipeline. Status transitions: started -> ingesting -> detecting -> splitting -> summarizing -> completed. Children have page/type/po_number/customer/amount/confidence/assigned_rep/queue fields.

Each child has: page, doc_id, type, po_number, customer, amount, confidence, assigned_rep, queue
PO numbers extracted: PO-61312 through PO-61316
All 5 children assigned to rep (Lisa Chen) with auto_approved status
Processing time ~75 seconds for 5 pages
